title: Fix decompose --no-compose to stop after parallel build
description: The decompose --no-compose flag should stop after parallel build phase, saving decompose-state.json and leaving sub-task branches on remote without running merge/verify/review/ship phases or creating a PR. Current behavior shows all phases (taskify, plan, build, verify, review, review-fix, ship) running instead of stopping early after build. The --no-compose flag is not being respected by the engine.
existing_patterns: .claude/commands/dynamic-test-suite.md:33 - decompose creates git worktrees for sub-tasks
.claude/commands/dynamic-test-suite.md:46 - decompose --no-compose should stop before merge, save decompose-state.json, verify no PR
.claude/commands/dynamic-test-suite.md:154 - Test generation rule #8: decompose --no-compose verifies no PR, state file saved, merge/verify/review/ship skipped
